action.reasoning: Observation: Train crashed on ReduceLROnPlateau(verbose=False) TypeError (deprecated in torch); workspace train.py is truncated/incomplete at batching loop; best AP still ~0.163 (val 0.1776). PyG imports continue to segfault. Analysis: Scheduler arg is root cause of current failure; incomplete code risks more bugs; FP+MLP is stable post-NaN fixes but under-capacity (current hidden=1024/3layer). Larger MLP (2048-dim, 4 layers, dropout=0.1), full robust train script with per-epoch metrics.jsonl logging (epoch/loss/val_ap), RemoveLROnPlateau without verbose, 40 epochs (time-safe ~few min with cache), grad_clip, masked BCE will improve convergence without new deps. Decision: Update model.py+train.py (predict.py compatible), train fully, then submit_eval on best.pt for higher avg_precision.
